capabilities.claude_capability: Agents reference exact commands and scripts.
capabilities.target_capability: Capability registry maps agents to skills and evidence but lacks complete command metadata.
acceptance: All executable agents expose validated entrypoints.

capabilities.claude_capability: High-value skills are self-contained directories with references.
capabilities.target_capability: Many target skills remain grouped Markdown sections.
acceptance: High-value executable skills have canonical packages.

capabilities.claude_capability: Parallel agent execution with loose text handoffs.
capabilities.target_capability: Schema-valid bounded DAG, evidence binding, budgets, decisions and consumed handoffs.
acceptance: No new tool bypasses runtime contracts.

capabilities.target_capability: Powerful main.py runtime without a complete SEO operator command family.
acceptance: Every command supports help, JSON and stable exit codes.
Command docs are generated from metadata.

capabilities.claude_capability: Live GSC queries and aggregate totals.
capabilities.target_capability: Example live adapter plus export parsers.
GA4 export parser only.
Live PageSpeed adapter with shared URL safety.
Current PageSpeed/CrUX path without full historical command.
CWV triage guidance without a dedicated decomposition command.
acceptance: TTFB, load delay, load duration and render delay output.

capabilities.claude_capability: Shared Playwright renderer with install flow.
capabilities.target_capability: Optional rendered-page adapter with no complete operator install path.

capabilities.claude_capability: Robots, sitemap, hreflang, redirect, preload, schema and indexability commands.
capabilities.target_capability: Adapters and skills exist but are not unified into operator commands.
Rubrics and agent reasoning without a complete deterministic command.
Runtime material-claim binding for agent outputs, not general page copy verification.

capabilities.claude_capability: Deterministic removal of formulaic AI-style phrasing.
capabilities.target_capability: Anti-AI public writing skill without a callable text transformation command.
acceptance: Do not claim AI detector evasion.

capabilities.claude_capability: Entity analysis with metadata and salience.
capabilities.target_capability: Knowledge-graph guidance without production entity-analysis command.
acceptance: Local fallback plus optional provider path.

capabilities.target_capability: Backlink adapters require exports or other sources.

capabilities.claude_capability: WHOIS-driven domain history and abuse check.
capabilities.target_capability: Policy reference without executable domain-history command.
Video SEO audit guidance without a live search command.
Reference guidance without executable metadata inspection/write planning.

capabilities.claude_capability: Baseline, compare, report and history commands.
capabilities.target_capability: Superior tamper-evident EvidenceStore and page-drift module without complete operator command family.
acceptance: Baseline, compare, history, report and watch commands.

capabilities.target_capability: Documented future connector only.

capabilities.claude_capability: DataForSEO, Ahrefs, SE Ranking, Profound, Firecrawl and Unlighthouse extensions.
capabilities.target_capability: Governed registry descriptions without complete installable packs.
acceptance: Each pack is optional and removable.
Cost estimate and approval precede calls.
Credential checks and smoke tests exist.

capabilities.target_capability: Smaller but high-quality canonical knowledge set.
acceptance: Every critical skill has sufficient reference coverage.

capabilities.target_capability: Five integrated FLOW stage files and shared writing governance.
acceptance: Modular prompts compose shared evidence and claims components.

capabilities.target_capability: No image-generation provider pack.
acceptance: Cost, provenance, rights, labeling and no-auto-publish controls.

capabilities.target_capability: Stronger cross-platform functional CI but missing coverage, typing, lint, dependency and SBOM gates.
acceptance: Coverage, typing, lint, secret scan, dependency audit and SBOM gates.

capabilities.claude_capability: Install, Quick Start and command reference.
capabilities.target_capability: Start Here and runtime examples without a complete clean-install journey.

capabilities.claude_capability: Releases, contributors, marketplace, issue templates, badges and security process.
capabilities.target_capability: Changelog and contribution guide without full project infrastructure.

capabilities.claude_capability: Versioned releases and installable platform distribution.
capabilities.target_capability: Version metadata without current public release artifact and tag discipline.
acceptance: Generic CLI and platform packages install successfully.
